message:
fix(core,journal): add fallocate type guards, harden COW journal open/recover, and regenerate EBR benchmarks

- Add symlink and non-extent file guards in ext4 fallocate path
- Harden NativeCowJournal::open to reject malformed tail records
- Add FailNthWriteBlockDevice and three COW robustness tests
- Fix formatting in poisoned-mutex helper and btrfs offset check
- Regenerate EBR memory usage benchmark artifact

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
